race.comment: MANHATTAN THUNDER (2) doesn't win very often but ran a strong race last time out over this track and trip when holding fourth. Strips rock-hard fit now and keep Stockdale. Leading player. STORMBOURG (4) flashed home into the placings here last start over this journey. Will drift back again but if the pace is decent she can reel them in late. RUBY AVENUE (3) finished third last start at the first run back from a spell over 1000m at this track, beaten a length. Will strip fitter this time. Placed to advantage and can fill another top-three spot. WILF (7) has left himself with far too much ground to bridge since resuming and has since been freshened with a month between runs. Draws to go back again but gets an important 3kg claim. Can improve sharply and fill a spot at long odds.
